fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the data template.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the data template.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table on which the data template is based.

fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table on which the data template is based.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the template is ready to be used.
